theme.auto_helper: Follows the day/night cycle from your location when allowed, otherwise

backup.inline_hint: Export or restore your cookies and local sessions when moving to another device.
backup.info_text: Your profiles, settings, and accounts are automatically synced via the cloud — they follow you across all your devices. Only session cookies (which keep you logged into social networks) cannot be synced: browsers forbid transferring them to third-party servers. To transfer your logged-in sessions to a new device, use the encrypted export below.
backup.export_hint: Choose a password to encrypt your cookies and profiles.
backup.import_hint: Enter the password used during export.
backup.export_step_1: Transfer the .sfbak file to your other device
backup.export_step_2: Install SocialGlowz on the new device
backup.export_step_3: Use "Restore a backup" with the same password
backup.export_tip: Keep your password safe — it is required to restore your data.
backup.import_done_message: All your profiles, accounts, and preferences have been restored.
backup.error_check_password: Is the password exactly the same as during export?
backup.error_check_file: Is the file a valid .sfbak backup?
backup.error_check_version: Was the backup created with a compatible version?
backup.error_invalid_file: This file does not appear to be a valid SocialGlowz backup.

friends_filter.hint_text: Enter names or usernames as they appear on {network}. Only their posts will be shown when the filter is active.
friends_filter.empty_hint: Add names to filter the feed

post.composer_placeholder: What do you want to share?

twitter.connect_message: To see your Twitter feed and interact with your followers, you need to sign in first.

linkedin.connect_message: To see your professional feed and interact with your network, you need to sign in first.
linkedin.post_placeholder: What do you want to talk about?

reddit.connect_message: To see your Reddit feed, you need to sign in to your account first.

nudge.title: Secure your data
nudge.promo_text: Create your account now and get 1 free month of SocialGlowz Pro!

onboarding.welcome_desc: All your social networks in one place. Let's set up your space in a few seconds.
onboarding.profile_desc: Pick an emoji and a name for your first profile. You can create more later.
onboarding.networks_desc: Select the networks you use. You can change this anytime.
onboarding.feature_profiles_desc: One profile per use case: personal, work, side project. Each with its own networks and isolated sessions.
onboarding.feature_customize_desc: Long-press a network on the dashboard to show or hide networks per profile. Each profile only displays what you need.
onboarding.feature_focus_desc: Switch to grayscale to reduce visual distractions.
onboarding.feature_friends_desc: See only posts from your close friends, without the algorithmic noise.
onboarding.feature_privacy_desc: Each profile has its own cookies — no cross-tracking between your accounts.

account.restart_after_sign_in: We’re reloading the app to apply your synced data cleanly.
account.signed_in_hint: Your account is linked. You can sign out at any time.
account.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
account.auth_hint: Sign in with an existing account or create one to sync your data across devices.
account.sync_info: The cloud syncs your SocialGlowz profiles, settings, accounts, friends filters, and custom links across your other devices.
account.cookies_info: We would also like to sync your logged-in sessions, but browsers and social networks forbid sending those cookies to third-party servers. To move your sessions to a new device, use the encrypted export below.
account.sign_in_hint: Sign in with your existing account to restore your synced data.
account.already_exists_error: An account already exists for this email. Use “Sign in” instead.
account.no_account_hint: Create an account to sync your data across all your devices.
account.unavailable_hint: Account sync is unavailable in this build — the Convex backend is not configured.

surface.popup_description: Open your social networks quickly from the toolbar popup.
surface.side_panel_description: Keep SocialGlowz open while browsing and launch networks in new tabs.
surface.options_description: Configure profile, language, and launcher behavior for extension mode.
surface.setup_description: Use this page for a larger launcher and profile control surface.
surface.install_description: Finish setup and open your extension dashboard.
surface.update_description: Review extension-mode capabilities after this update.

launch.dashboard_opened: Dashboard opened in a new tab.

errors.empty: Please provide a label and URL.
errors.credentials_not_allowed: Links with embedded credentials are blocked.
errors.tabs_api_unavailable: Browser tabs API is unavailable in this context.
errors.tab_creation_failed: Unable to open this link in a new tab.
errors.runtime_url_unavailable: Unable to resolve extension dashboard URL.
errors.side_panel_unavailable: Side panel is only available in Chrome-compatible contexts.
errors.side_panel_failed: Unable to open the side panel.

limitations.session_isolation: Extension mode uses regular browser tabs. It cannot isolate cookies and localStorage per SocialGlowz profile like native Tauri WebViews.
limitations.native_backup: Native backup and restore workflows are unavailable in extension mode.
limitations.native_haptics: Haptics and Android bottom-bar controls are unavailable in extension mode.

auth_sync.ready_message: Your data is in place. You can use the app now.

messages.waitingServer: We’re waiting for your server data so the app can restore the right state.
messages.dataReceived: Your synced data just arrived from the cloud.
messages.dataApplied: Your profiles, settings, and synced items have been applied to the app.
messages.restarting: We’re reloading SocialGlowz so it comes back with your synced state fully applied.
